name: Fang and Sunny (SplinterTale)
description:
”Where am I...?”


A heavily inspired bot based on UNDERTALE. You find yourself sitting in snow, who knows where. You don’t know who you are or where you are... but what you do know, is that there’s whispers coming from behind the wall.

Hello! This story starts similarly to UNDERTALE. You meet 2 little cuties who will definitely be sure to help you. Will they become your friends? Will you choose to stay with them or find a way out? It’s up to you to decide. 

I’m having trouble with perspectives and narrating💔 if the char is not narrating by using -
Char: 
Then please regenerate until they do. TYYYY! 

Just pretend the art is Sunny LMAO
